title: Astronomers Spot Cosmic Sugar for the First Time!

scenes.text: Scientists discovered sugar molecules floating in the cosmos!
This is the first time sugar has been identified outside our solar system.
Molecules found are similar to those that form life on Earth.
This finding hints at the building blocks of life in the universe.
scenes.label: BUILDING BLOCKS OF LIFE

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Astronomers have uncovered sugar molecules in interstellar space, reshaping our understanding of life's building blocks. Follow for more cosmic discoveries!
